407	export function getThemesForBaseColor(baseColorName: string) {
408	  const baseColorNames = BASE_COLORS.map((bc) => bc.name)
409	
410	  return THEMES.filter((theme) => {
411	    if (theme.name === baseColorName) {
412	      return true
413	    }
414	    return !baseColorNames.includes(theme.name)
415	  })
416	}
417	
418	export function getBase(name: BaseName) {
419	  return BASES.find((base) => base.name === name)
420	}
421	
422	export function getStyle(name: StyleName) {
423	  return STYLES.find((style) => style.name === name)
424	}
425	
426	export function getTheme(name: ThemeName) {
427	  return THEMES.find((theme) => theme.name === name)
428	}
429	
430	export function getBaseColor(name: BaseColorName) {
431	  return BASE_COLORS.find((color) => color.name === name)
432	}
433	
434	export function getIconLibrary(name: IconLibraryName) {
435	  return iconLibraries[name]
436	}
437	
438	// Builds a registry:theme item from a design system config.
439	export function buildRegistryTheme(config: DesignSystemConfig) {
440	  const baseColor = getBaseColor(config.baseColor)
441	  const theme = getTheme(config.theme)
442	
443	  if (!baseColor || !theme) {
444	    throw new Error(
445	      `Base color "${config.baseColor}" or theme "${config.theme}" not found`
446	    )
447	  }
448	
449	  // Merge base color and theme CSS vars.
450	  const lightVars: Record<string, string> = {
451	    ...(baseColor.cssVars?.light as Record<string, string>),
452	    ...(theme.cssVars?.light as Record<string, string>),
453	  }
454	  const darkVars: Record<string, string> = {
455	    ...(baseColor.cssVars?.dark as Record<string, string>),
456	    ...(theme.cssVars?.dark as Record<string, string>),
457	  }
458	  const themeVars: Record<string, string> = {}
459	
460	  // Apply chart color override.
461	  const chartTheme = getTheme(config.chartColor)
462	  if (chartTheme) {
463	    const chartLight = chartTheme.cssVars?.light as Record<string, string>
464	    const chartDark = chartTheme.cssVars?.dark as Record<string, string>
465	    for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
466	      const key = `chart-${i}`
467	      if (chartLight?.[key]) lightVars[key] = chartLight[key]
468	      if (chartDark?.[key]) darkVars[key] = chartDark[key]
469	    }
470	  }
471	
472	  // Apply menu accent transformation.
473	  if (config.menuAccent === "bold") {
474	    lightVars.accent = lightVars.primary
475	    lightVars["accent-foreground"] = lightVars["primary-foreground"]
476	    darkVars.accent = darkVars.primary
477	    darkVars["accent-foreground"] = darkVars["primary-foreground"]
478	    // lightVars["sidebar-accent"] = lightVars.primary
479	    // lightVars["sidebar-accent-foreground"] = lightVars["primary-foreground"]
480	    // darkVars["sidebar-accent"] = darkVars.primary
481	    // darkVars["sidebar-accent-foreground"] = darkVars["primary-foreground"]
482	  }
483	
484	  // Apply radius transformation.
485	  if (config.radius && config.radius !== "default") {
486	    const radius = RADII.find((r) => r.name === config.radius)
487	    if (radius && radius.value) {
488	      lightVars.radius = radius.value
489	    }
490	  }
491	
492	  return {
493	    name: `${config.baseColor}-${config.theme}`,
494	    type: "registry:theme" as const,
495	    cssVars: {
496	      theme: Object.keys(themeVars).length > 0 ? themeVars : undefined,
497	      light: lightVars,
498	      dark: darkVars,
499	    },
500	  }
501	}
502	
503	// Builds a registry:base item from a design system config.
504	export function buildRegistryBase(config: DesignSystemConfig) {
505	  const baseItem = getBase(config.base)
506	  const iconLibraryItem = getIconLibrary(config.iconLibrary)
507	  const normalizedFontHeading =
508	    config.fontHeading === config.font ? "inherit" : config.fontHeading
509	
510	  if (!baseItem || !iconLibraryItem) {
511	    throw new Error(
512	      `Base "${config.base}" or icon library "${config.iconLibrary}" not found`
513	    )
514	  }
515	
516	  const registryTheme = buildRegistryTheme(config)
517	
518	  // Build dependencies.
519	  const dependencies = [
520	    `shadcn@${SHADCN_VERSION}`,
521	    "class-variance-authority",
522	    "tw-animate-css",
523	    ...(baseItem.dependencies ?? []),
524	    ...iconLibraryItem.packages,
525	  ]
526	
527	  const registryDependencies = ["utils"]
528	  const themeVars = {
529	    ...(registryTheme.cssVars?.theme ?? {}),
530	    ...(normalizedFontHeading === "inherit"
531	      ? { "--font-heading": getInheritedHeadingFontValue(config.font) }
532	      : {}),
533	  }
534	
535	  if (config.font) {
536	    registryDependencies.push(`font-${config.font}`)
537	  }
538	
539	  if (normalizedFontHeading !== "inherit") {
540	    registryDependencies.push(`font-heading-${normalizedFontHeading}`)
541	  }
542	
543	  return {
544	    name: `${config.base}-${config.style}`,
545	    extends: "none",
546	    type: "registry:base" as const,
547	    config: {
548	      style: `${config.base}-${config.style}`,
549	      iconLibrary: iconLibraryItem.name,
550	      rtl: config.rtl,
551	      menuColor: config.menuColor,
552	      menuAccent: config.menuAccent,
553	      tailwind: {
554	        baseColor: config.baseColor,
555	      },
556	    },
557	    dependencies,
558	    registryDependencies,
559	    cssVars: {
560	      ...registryTheme.cssVars,
561	      theme: Object.keys(themeVars).length > 0 ? themeVars : undefined,
562	    },
563	    css: {
564	      '@import "tw-animate-css"': {},
565	      '@import "shadcn/tailwind.css"': {},
566	      "@layer base": {
567	        "*": { "@apply border-border outline-ring/50": {} },
568	        body: { "@apply bg-background text-foreground": {} },
569	      },
570	    },
571	    ...(config.rtl && {
572	      docs: `To learn how to set up the RTL provider and fonts for your app, see https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/rtl/${config.template === "next-monorepo" ? "next" : (config.template ?? "next")}`,
573	    }),
574	  }
575	}

{children}
 ) } // 4. Sub-components consume context function CarouselContent() { const { carouselRef, orientation } = useCarousel() return
} ``` ### Tabs Pattern (CVA + data-orientation) ```tsx import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority" // Uses data-orientation on root, group-data-[orientation=...]/tabs CSS selectors // data-slot="tabs", data-slot="tabs-list", data-slot="tabs-trigger", data-slot="tabs-content" ``` ### Key Patterns to Follow - `"use client"` directive at top (uses hooks) - `data-slot="..."` attributes on every component for CSS targeting - `data-state="..."` for visual state (active/completed/inactive) - `data-orientation="..."` for orientation support - `cn()` imported from `@/lib/utils` for class merging - `React.ComponentProps<"div">` for type-safe HTML props pass-through - Context null-check with helpful error messages ## Stepper Component Requirements Sub-components needed: 1. `Stepper` - Root container, holds Context provider. ` element) 5. `StepperDescription` - Step description text (`

` element) 6. `StepperSeparator` - Visual separator between steps (divider line) 7. `StepperContent` - Content panel, shown only when step is active. Optional `step` prop for use outside `StepperItem`. "active" : step < activeStep ? "completed" : "inactive"` Controlled/uncontrolled pattern: - `defaultStep?: number` for uncontrolled (internal state) - `activeStep?: number` + `onStepChange?: (step: number) => void` for controlled - When controlled (activeStep !== undefined), clicks call onStepChange but don't update internal state Orientation layout: - Horizontal: Stepper is `flex-row items-start`, StepperItem is `flex-col items-center`, StepperSeparator is `h-px flex-1 mt-4 bg-muted-foreground/30` (mt-4 aligns with center of size-8 indicator circle) - Vertical: Stepper is `flex-col`, StepperItem is `flex-row gap-4`, StepperSeparator is `w-px min-h-6 ms-4 bg-muted-foreground/30` (ms-4 aligns under circle center) StepperContent: Shows/hides based on whether its step equals activeStep. If inside StepperItem, uses item context. If outside (has `step` prop), reads from root context directly. ## Demo Requirements The `stepper-demo.tsx` should: - Show a 3-step wizard: "Account" → "Profile" → "Review" - Horizontal orientation by default - Each step has a numbered circle indicator, title, description - Navigation buttons: "Back" and "Next" / "Finish" - Show step content below the stepper - Import from `@/registry/new-york-v4/ui/stepper` and `@/registry/new-york-v4/ui/button` - Use controlled mode (parent manages `activeStep` with `useState`) ## Request Please design the complete, detailed implementation including: 1. Full TypeScript code for `stepper.tsx` (complete file, all sub-components) 2. Full TypeScript code for `stepper-demo.tsx` (complete file) 3. Exact registry entries to append to `ui/_registry.ts` and `examples/_registry.ts` 4. Exact insertion approach (alphabetical placement for 'stepper' between 'sonner' and 'switch' in the registry arrays) Be precise about Tailwind classes, TypeScript types, and the exact shape of every component's props and JSX.

3	import { Slot } from "radix-ui"
4	
5	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
6	
7	const buttonVariants = cva(
8	  "inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
9	  {
10	    variants: {
11	      variant: {
12	        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
13	        destructive:
14	          "bg-destructive text-white hover:bg-destructive/90 focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:bg-destructive/60 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40",
15	        outline:
16	          "border bg-background shadow-xs hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:border-input dark:bg-input/30 dark:hover:bg-input/50",
17	        secondary:
18	          "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
19	        ghost:
20	          "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:hover:bg-accent/50",
21	        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
22	      },
23	      size: {
24	        default: "h-9 px-4 py-2 has-[>svg]:px-3",
25	        xs: "h-6 gap-1 rounded-md px-2 text-xs has-[>svg]:px-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
26	        sm: "h-8 gap-1.5 rounded-md px-3 has-[>svg]:px-2.5",
27	        lg: "h-10 rounded-md px-6 has-[>svg]:px-4",
28	        icon: "size-9",
29	        "icon-xs": "size-6 rounded-md [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
30	        "icon-sm": "size-8",
31	        "icon-lg": "size-10",
32	      },
33	    },
34	    defaultVariants: {
35	      variant: "default",
36	      size: "default",
37	    },
38	  }
39	)
40	
41	function Button({
42	  className,
43	  variant = "default",
44	  size = "default",
45	  asChild = false,
46	  ...props
47	}: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
48	  VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
49	    asChild?: boolean
50	  }) {
51	  const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button"
52	
53	  return (
54	    <Comp
55	      data-slot="button"
56	      data-variant={variant}
57	      data-size={size}
58	      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
59	      {...props}
60	    />
61	  )
62	}
63	
64	export { Button, buttonVariants }

I need you to design a complete implementation plan for adding a "Stepper" compound component to a shadcn/ui project. Here is all the context you need: ## Project Structure - Root: `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/` - UI components: `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/` (e.g., `carousel.tsx`, `tabs.tsx`, `accordion.tsx`) - Examples: `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/examples/` (e.g., `tabs-demo.tsx`, `accordion-demo.tsx`) - UI registry: `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/_registry.ts` - Examples registry: `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/examples/_registry.ts` - Main registry: `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/registry.ts` (auto-imports from sub-registries — NO changes needed here) ## Constraint: Do NOT modify any existing component files. Only create new files and add registry entries. ## Registry Entry Format **UI registry entry format** (from `ui/_registry.ts` line 1-14): ```typescript import { type Registry } from "shadcn/schema" export const ui: Registry["items"] = [ { name: "accordion", type: "registry:ui", dependencies: ["radix-ui"], files: [{ path: "ui/accordion.tsx", type: "registry:ui" }], }, // ... ] ``` **Example registry entry format** (from `examples/_registry.ts` line 1-14): ```typescript import { type Registry } from "shadcn/schema" export const examples: Registry["items"] = [ { name: "accordion-demo", type: "registry:example", registryDependencies: ["accordion"], files: [{ path: "examples/accordion-demo.tsx", type: "registry:example" }], }, // ... ] ``` ## Existing Component Patterns ### Carousel Pattern (Context + Custom Hook) — most relevant for Stepper ```tsx "use client" import * as React from "react" // 1. Context type definition type CarouselContextProps = { /* state fields */ } & CarouselProps const CarouselContext = React.createContext(null) // 2. Custom hook with error guard function useCarousel() { const context = React.useContext(CarouselContext) if (!context) throw new Error("useCarousel must be used within a ") return context } // 3. Root component provides context function Carousel({ orientation = "horizontal", ...props }) { // internal state + callbacks return (
{children}
 ) } // 4. Sub-components consume context function CarouselContent() { const { carouselRef, orientation } = useCarousel() return
} ``` ### Tabs Pattern (CVA + data-orientation) ```tsx import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority" // Uses data-orientation on root, group-data-[orientation=...]/tabs CSS selectors // data-slot="tabs", data-slot="tabs-list", data-slot="tabs-trigger", data-slot="tabs-content" ``` ### Key Patterns to Follow - `"use client"` directive at top (uses hooks) - `data-slot="..."` attributes on every component for CSS targeting - `data-state="..."` for visual state (active/completed/inactive) - `data-orientation="..."` for orientation support - `cn()` imported from `@/lib/utils` for class merging - `React.ComponentProps<"div">` for type-safe HTML props pass-through - Context null-check with helpful error messages ## Stepper Component Requirements Sub-components needed: 1. `Stepper` - Root container, holds Context provider. Props: `activeStep`, `defaultStep`, `onStepChange`, `orientation` 2. `StepperItem` - Individual step wrapper. Props: `step` (number). Provides StepperItemContext. 3. `StepperTrigger` - Clickable button to navigate to a step. Calls `setActiveStep(step)`. 4. `StepperTitle` - Step title text (`

` element) 5. `StepperDescription` - Step description text (`

` element) 6. `StepperSeparator` - Visual separator between steps (divider line) 7. `StepperContent` - Content panel, shown only when step is active. Optional `step` prop for use outside `StepperItem`. State management: - Two contexts: `StepperContext` (root) and `StepperItemContext` (per-item) - Root context: `{ activeStep, setActiveStep, orientation }` - Item context: `{ step, state: "active" | "completed" | "inactive" }` - Item state computed as: `step === activeStep ? "active" : step < activeStep ? "completed" : "inactive"` Controlled/uncontrolled pattern: - `defaultStep?: number` for uncontrolled (internal state) - `activeStep?: number` + `onStepChange?: (step: number) => void` for controlled - When controlled (activeStep !== undefined), clicks call onStepChange but don't update internal state Orientation layout: - Horizontal: Stepper is `flex-row items-start`, StepperItem is `flex-col items-center`, StepperSeparator is `h-px flex-1 mt-4 bg-muted-foreground/30` (mt-4 aligns with center of size-8 indicator circle) - Vertical: Stepper is `flex-col`, StepperItem is `flex-row gap-4`, StepperSeparator is `w-px min-h-6 ms-4 bg-muted-foreground/30` (ms-4 aligns under circle center) StepperContent: Shows/hides based on whether its step equals activeStep. If inside StepperItem, uses item context. If outside (has `step` prop), reads from root context directly. ## Demo Requirements The `stepper-demo.tsx` should: - Show a 3-step wizard: "Account" → "Profile" → "Review" - Horizontal orientation by default - Each step has a numbered circle indicator, title, description - Navigation buttons: "Back" and "Next" / "Finish" - Show step content below the stepper - Import from `@/registry/new-york-v4/ui/stepper` and `@/registry/new-york-v4/ui/button` - Use controlled mode (parent manages `activeStep` with `useState`) ## Request Please design the complete, detailed implementation including: 1. Full TypeScript code for `stepper.tsx` (complete file, all sub-components) 2. Full TypeScript code for `stepper-demo.tsx` (complete file) 3. Exact registry entries to append to `ui/_registry.ts` and `examples/_registry.ts` 4. Exact insertion approach (alphabetical placement for 'stepper' between 'sonner' and 'switch' in the registry arrays) Be precise about Tailwind classes, TypeScript types, and the exact shape of every component's props and JSX.
